displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #6: Jedi Assault
synopsis: In the final, climactic issue of this landmark series, two renegade Jedi, Ulic Qel-Droma and Exar Kun, clash in mortal combat. One will be awarded the title of Dark Lord of the Sith, the most feared and powerful force in the galaxy; the other may be awarded a shallow grave. The fate of the entire universe rests on the outcome!
title: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #6: Jedi Assault
